title: The most insane week in AI
summary: YouTube channel AI Search published a video covering major AI developments in a single week, highlighting new model releases and research projects. The video reviews advances in language models, vision systems, game engines, and robotics from companies and labs including DeepSeek, OpenAI, Tencent, Xiaomi, Qwen, and Hugging Face.
